## Supplementary Sources (Agent F)

| ID | Title | Publisher | Type | URL | Access Date | Notes |
|----|-------|-----------|------|-----|-------------|-------|
| SUP-001 | RYA Day Skipper Theory Course Page | Royal Yachting Association (RYA) | Official course page | https://www.rya.org.uk/training/courses/Day-Skipper-Theory-Course-DSSCC | 2026-03-15 | Canonical 9-topic syllabus; no free downloads |
| SUP-002 | RYA Day Skipper Shorebased Notes (G113) | Royal Yachting Association (RYA) | Official paid publication | https://www.rya.org.uk/shop/p/rya-day-skipper-shorebased-notes | 2026-03-15 | 104pp, 2023 ed., ISBN 9781910017418; £14.99 — not freely accessible |
| SUP-003 | Endeavour Sailing: Day Skipper Shorebased Theory Syllabus | Endeavour Sailing (RYA Training Centre) | Free web page — syllabus with learning outcomes | https://www.endeavour-sailing.co.uk/training-information/rya-theory-syllabi/day-skipper-shorebased-theory-course-syllabus | 2026-03-15 | 17 topics with full/working/outline knowledge levels |
| SUP-004 | Classic Sailing: RYA Day Skipper Theory Syllabus | Classic Sailing Ltd | Free web article | https://classic-sailing.com/article/rya-day-skipper-theory-syllabus/ | 2026-03-15 | 17-topic syllabus overview |
| SUP-005 | Hamble School of Yachting: Day Skipper Theory Syllabus | Hamble School of Yachting & Hamble Sea School Ltd | Free web page | https://www.hamble.co.uk/day-skipper-theory-syllabus | 2026-03-15 | 17 topics; corroborates SUP-003 |
| SUP-006 | Stafford Coastal Cruising: Day Skipper Theory Syllabus PDF | Stafford Coastal Cruising (Derek Miles, Dec 2024) | Free downloadable PDF | https://www.staffordcoastalcruising.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/Day-Skipper-Theory-Syllabus-Click-to-Download.pdf | 2026-03-15 | Most recently dated public syllabus found |
| SUP-007 | Sailing Course Online: RYA Day Skipper Theory Online | Sailing Course Online (RYA, Hamble Point Marina) | Free course description page | https://www.sailingcourseonline.co.uk/rya-day-skipper-theory-online/ | 2026-03-15 | 7-module breakdown; exam structure detail |
| SUP-008 | Elite Sailing: Day Skipper Theory Shore-based Course | Elite Sailing (Elite Sailing South East Ltd) | Free course description page | https://elitesailing.co.uk/shorebased-courses/day-skipper/ | 2026-03-15 | Materials list; links to course details PDF |
| SUP-009 | White Wake Sailing: Day Skipper Theory Quiz | White Wake Sailing | Free 10-question interactive quiz | https://white-wake.com/quiz/ | 2026-03-15 | 10 Q&As extracted; covers COLREGS, nav lights, anchoring |
| SUP-010 | Easy-Quizzz.com: Day Skipper Practice Test (194 questions) | Easy-Quizzz.com | Freemium practice test bank | https://www.easy-quizzz.com/gb/driving-theory-test-practice/sailing-quiz-questions/day-skipper-exam-questions/quiz.html | 2026-03-15 | Third-party commercial; verify answers against RYA sources |
| SUP-011 | Skippers Online: RYA Theory Exam Guidance | Skippers Online (RYA-recognised) | Free web page | https://www.skippersonline.net/exam-guidance/ | 2026-03-15 | Exam structure: 2 papers × 90 min; open-book chartwork |
| SUP-012 | Nomad Sailing: Day Shapes Self Test | Nomad Sailing Ltd | Free interactive quiz | https://www.nomadsailing.co.uk/learning-zone/day-shapes-test.html | 2026-03-15 | 13 day-shape scenarios; image-recognition format |
| SUP-013 | Skippers Online: Student Resources Hub (19 downloads) | Skippers Online (RYA-recognised) | Free resource collection | https://www.skippersonline.net/student-resources/ | 2026-03-15 | Includes IRPCS text, SOLAS V, Beaufort, cardinal marks, Mayday card, chartwork symbols |
| SUP-014 | Skippers Online: RYA Theory Exam Guidance | Skippers Online (RYA-recognised) | Free web page | https://www.skippersonline.net/exam-guidance/ | 2026-03-15 | See SUP-011 — same page; listed for teaching resources cross-ref |
